name: J. C. Johnson
abstract: Jay Cee Johnson (September 14, 1896 – February 27, 1981), usually known as J. C.

about_quotes.speaker: Russell Procope
about_quotes.evidence: The first record date I made was with a piano player named J. C. Johnson, James C. Johnson.

about_quotes.speaker: Russell Procope
about_quotes.evidence: The first record date I made was with a piano player named J. C. Johnson

about_quotes.speaker: Alberta Hunter
about_quotes.evidence: I was singing that for J.C. Johnson... I wanted to sing it so that he could make the money.

about_quotes.speaker: Vince Giordano
about_quotes.evidence: We did one performance backing him up at Dick Wellstood’s funeral
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince Giordano interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2007
